rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE JOHN C. OWENS TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: To Compel Deposition Testimony Of Petitioner Catherine M. Owens; For Production Of Documents And For Sanctions Against Petitioners And Their Counsel
rulings.Rulings: Matter on Calendar for Friday, October 13, 2006. Respondent David Le Duc's motion to compel the deposition of Catherine Owens and the production of documents is granted. Counsel for the parties are ordered to meet and confer as to a mutually convenient time to resume the deposition. The deposition shall be completed by November 13, 2006. The Court finds that counsel for petitioner terminated the deposition and opposed the instant motion without substantial justification. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $2,040.06 are to be paid by counsel for petitioner on or before November 13, 2006. = (610/BEC)
